    Make It Great 28.10.2024
    What is it with them and Sabrina Carpenter one of her songs gets played once every bloody hour. This station used to be good back 5 or 4 years ago but thanks to the terrible change in pop music and rise of artists like Benson Boone Noah Khan Teddy Swims the list goes on. What is the world coming to. :(

    User 05.06.2024
    Keeps skipping verses of songs all the time which drives me nuts. It's like listening to a badly scratched CD.

    Listening from UK, this is my kind of radio. Would highly recommend x Loving the upbeat music and Sabrina Carpenter is my absolute favourite :D

Information about the radio

Capital FM network was officially established in 2011. But its flagship radio station (Capital London radio station) started broadcasting in 1973. Within next years other existing radio stations were renamed and added to this network. It changed its owners several times (previous owners are GCap Media, Chrysalis Radio; current owner is Global Radio).

The official name of this radio network is 95-106 Capital and the slogan is “The UK’s No. 1 Hit Music Station”. They play contemporary hits, offer local news and broadcast various shows and charts like Capital Breakfast, Drivetime, Vodafone Big Top 40 etc.

Our website provides live stream of this radio station so that you can listen to Capital FM online regardless of your geographic location.

Find the frequency to listen to us on FM radio in your area right here...

London:
• London 95.8

Birmingham:
• Birmingham 102.2

Cymru:
• Anglesey & Gwynedd 103

East Midlands:
• Derby 102.8
• Leicester 105.4
• Nottingham 96.2 (Mansfield 96.5)

Liverpool:
• Liverpool 107.6

Manchester:
• Manchester 102

North-East:
• North East 105-106

North West & North Wales:
• North Wales Coast 96.3
• Wirral 97.1
• Wrexham & Cheshire 103.4

Scotland:
• Edinburgh 105.7
• Glasgow 106.1

South Coast:
• South Coast 103.2

South Wales:
• Cardiff 103.2
• Newport 97.4

Yorkshire:
• Leeds 105.1
• Hull 105.8
